title: Robust Spring Turkish Aubergine Pilaf
description: A savory one-pot Turkish dish featuring aubergine, double-fry technique, and springy flavors, made in a Korean brass bowl, this recipe is sugar-free friendly and perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in the Korean brass bowl over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add the cubed aubergine and cook until it starts to brown, about 5 minutes.
Add the turkish rice and cook for 1-2 minutes, stirring constantly.
Add the chicken broth, salt, black pepper, and paprika, and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low, cover the bowl, and simmer for 20 minutes.
Turn off the heat and let it rest for 5 minutes before serving.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
